title: Albemarle Announces New Supply Chain Leadership
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , April 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, announced today that Maria Brennan has joined the company as Chief Supply Chain Officer, effective April 29, 2022.

title: Albemarle: Beat Inflation With Surging Lithium Prices And Production Growth
text: Albemarle currently operates just three mines, though two of them are some of the largest in the world. Future expansions and the addition of new projects look to add a significant amount of volume to Albemarle's production.

title: Albemarle Joins United Nations Global Compact CEO Water Mandate
text: Company commits to six core water management areas and annual reporting CHARLOTTE, N.C. , April 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, announced today that it has endorsed the United Nations (UN) Global Compact CEO Water Mandate, a global initiative in partnership with the Pacific Institute, that mobilizes business leaders to advance water stewardship practices.

title: Albemarle Recognized by American Chemistry Council with Eight Responsible Care Awards
text: Includes three awards for the company's lithium production site in Silver Peak, Nevada CHARLOTTE, N.C. , April 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, announced today that it earned eight American Chemistry Council (ACC) Responsible Care Awards for its continued excellence in sustainability initiatives for health, safety and environmental areas of focus.
